[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark-themed social media profile screen with a circular community logo, account statistics, and several interface icons, plus a grid of three smaller video thumbnails at the bottom.

Main Subject:
A centered profile header displays a circular logo with a colorful design and the large red text “NARE,” beneath which the profile name reads “NARE | Nakama Realm” and the handle “@nare_community” appears in smaller text. Three numbers are shown in a row: “5 Following,” “250 Followers,” and “305 Likes,” followed by a prominent oval button labeled “Message” and additional circular icon buttons to the right.

Setting:
This appears to be an in-app screen capture or screen view of a social media profile, shown on a dark background with status icons at the top of the display. No physical environment is visible.

Visual Details:
The overall background is dark gray to black. The profile area is centered, with the circular logo at the top of the header and white text underneath. The “Message” button is a dark rounded pill shape with a paper-plane icon on the left and the word “Message” in white. Below the statistics and buttons, a line of text reads “Komunitas untuk semua kalangan ✨.” Interface icons appear in the upper right (a bell icon and a bookmark-like icon), and an arrow icon appears in the upper left. At the bottom of the screen, three video thumbnails are visible side-by-side in a dark overlay: the left thumbnail shows a purple-blue gradient background and small white text; the middle thumbnail shows a smartphone-like screen with chat or post elements and a green light; the right thumbnail is mostly dark with visible white playback count text. Additional small playback-count numbers appear near the bottom corners of thumbnails (for example “2,342,” “1,071,” and others that are partially visible). A partially visible bottom area suggests more content below the thumbnails.

Visible Text:
5:21 X
NARE | Nakama Realm
@nare_community
5 Following
250 Followers
305 Likes
Message
Komunitas untuk semua kalangan ✨
No other clearly legible text detected in the smaller thumbnails.

Practical Summary:
The image is a screenshot of a social media profile page for “NARE | Nakama Realm,” showing a logo, follower and like counts, a message button, and a short community description. It also includes three video thumbnails along the bottom with playback counts displayed on the thumbnail overlays.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
